related_issues.title: Auto-restart missed same-account feedback
related_issues.relation: Introduced trustAuthenticatedUserComments:true for the auto-restart loop, which removed the previous same-account safety net and exposed this loop.
Origin of checkForExistingComment / tool-comment marker checks.

external_references.title: Working with comments - GitHub REST API guide
external_references.note: A pull request is an issue with code: PR conversation comments use the Issues comments endpoints, while line-level comments use the pull request review comment endpoints.

external_references.title: REST API endpoints for issue comments - GitHub Docs
external_references.note: Endpoint used for PR conversation comments: /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/{number}/comments.

external_references.title: REST API endpoints for pull request review comments - GitHub Docs
external_references.note: Endpoint used for inline review comments: /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{number}/comments.

external_references.title: Endless cycle of GitHub Actions initiated by a build - community discussion #74772
external_references.note: Canonical self-triggering loop: automation reacts to events (or comments) it produced itself. Standard mitigations are actor/identity checks and skip markers.

external_references.title: Workflow infinite loop - community discussion #26970
external_references.note: Same class of bug; the GITHUB_TOKEN deliberately does not re-trigger workflows to break the loop. hive-mind has no equivalent guard for AI-authored comments, so it must filter them itself.
